title: podman system migrate fixes when pause process and conmon got killed
body:
see individual commits



#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
Fixed a possible nil deref during podman system migrate.
Improved the reliability  of the podman rootless userns creating when conmon and the pause process where killed unexpectedly.
```

comments.body: Overall LGTM minus one comment, but we really need a Giuseppe review to merge, my grasp on this code isn't as good as I'd like
